manager.name: On-chain Fundamentals
manager.description: Leans on real on-chain context from DefiLlama and Mobula in the live signal layer, while historical ranking and backtests are limited to the stored price, event, and news history available in the system. Treat it as an on-chain-tilted fundamentals desk rather than a full wallet-level simulator.
manager.memoStyle: Protocol fundamentals brief with on-chain context where available
manager.universe: DeFi protocols with measurable TVL, fee revenue, and on-chain activity (ETH, SOL, TRON, Base ecosystems)

manager.name: Polymarket Specialist
manager.description: Hunts mispriced probabilities across crypto prediction markets on Polymarket. Buys YES/NO positions when market odds diverge from news-implied fair value. Holds no spot tokens — pure prediction market alpha.
manager.memoStyle: Probability arbitrage thesis with event calendar
manager.universe: Polymarket crypto prediction markets (BTC, ETH, SOL price targets, protocol events, ecosystem milestones)
